title: The Broken Phone
content: Nathan dropped his phone while getting off the bus. The screen cracked immediately. He picked it up carefully and hoped it still worked, but the display stayed black. Nathan felt frustrated because he used his phone for almost everything. After work, he visited a repair shop near the train station. The employee looked at the phone and said the repair would take two days. Nathan sighed and borrowed an old phone from his brother for the week. He suddenly realized how dependent he was on technology every day.
